name: Metadata Conforms to for XAS
abstract: For XAS profle, need to declare conformatnce iwht provile in the metadata. Defines properties: dcterms:conformsTo. Uses building blocks: cdifCatalogRecord (cdifProperties).
description:
## Metadata metadata for XAS profile properties

Only addition is declaration of conformance.

examples.title: Example XAS metadata conforms to extension.
examples.content: Import base schema.org SubjectOf, add requiremnet that dcterms:conformsTo has XAS profile URI.

annotatedSchema:
$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema
type: object
allOf:
- $ref: https://cross-domain-interoperability-framework.github.io/metadataBuildingBlocks/build/annotated/bbr/metadata/cdifProperties/cdifCatalogRecord/schema.yaml
- properties:
    dcterms:conformsTo:
      type: array
      items:
        $ref: https://cross-domain-interoperability-framework.github.io/metadataBuildingBlocks/build/annotated/bbr/metadata/cdifProperties/cdifCatalogRecord/schema.yaml#/$defs/conformsTo_item
      minItems: 2
      contains:
        type: object
        properties:
          '@id':
            const: https://w3id.org/cdif/bbr/metadata/profiles/cdifProfiles/CDIFxas
        required:
        - '@id'
      minContains: 1
x-jsonld-prefixes:
  schema: http://schema.org/
